channel.title: Times Square on Gourmand Syndrome
channel.description: Recent content in Times Square on Gourmand Syndrome

item.title: Tony's Di Napoli
item.description: Tony’s Di Napoli is a NYC Italian American restaurant that has been around for a number of decades. It’s probably comparable to Buca Di Beppo or Maggiano, but it is less of a domestic chain than a NYC chain. They serve family style portions, and they have both half and full sizes of many of their pastas. This particular location is located in Times Square, and normally I shy away from this.
